LanguageData.ABY_DifficultySettingsDesc: Global threat protocol for summon pressure, instability, reward routing, and future encounter composition.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultySettingsLock: Lock protocol after first boss kill
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultySettingsLockDesc: Prevents switching between difficulty profiles after the first Archon Beast kill has been recorded on this save.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultySettingsLockedNow: Protocol changes are currently locked on this save because the first boss kill has already been recorded.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyDiagnostics_Locked: Protocol changes are locked after the first boss kill on this save.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyDiagnostics_Armed: Protocol lock will engage after the first boss kill on this save.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyProfile_Normal_Desc: Baseline Abyssal protocol. Uses the current intended summon pressure without softening the mod.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyProfile_Severe_Desc: Pushes the circle into harder mixed-pressure breaches. Support and elite pieces begin appearing earlier, but progression gates stay intact.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyProfile_Rupture_Desc: Escalates breach composition and cadence. High-value support pieces enter the rotation more often and instability starts punishing overuse faster.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyProfile_Dominion_Desc: Hard endgame protocol. Dominion pressure rises, escort mixes sharpen, and the system is allowed to reach one tier deeper when legal content exists.
LanguageData.ABY_DifficultyProfile_FinalGate_Desc: Apex protocol. The circle leans into deep escalation, future high-tier content is allowed in sooner when tagged for it, and long fights become harsher to stabilize.
